summary:
Recovery: Average

Reading: State
Average
Recovery 53 • Sleep 68 • Strain 100%

Read
A heavier training day landed on a softer recovery base, with sleep running short and movement lighter than your usual day. The night favors repair over added strain; the main tension is a deep food gap with protein still too thin for muscle protection.

Recovery takes priority.

Performance: Recovery takes priority.

Transit: none
